LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 663. PLAINTIFF IS RELYING ON NEW EVIDENCE NOT UNCONTROVERTED EVIDENCE THAT PREVIOUSLY WAS BEFORE THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF RE PURPORTED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY FOR RESCISSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRUCIANO, ANTHONY S.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF RE PURPORTED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY FOR RESCISSION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THERE IS NO BASIS TO RESCIND THE AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO FRUCIANO'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF FILED APRIL 30, 2008 ARE RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 2, 4, 5 (FIRST SENTENCE AND FOURTH SENTENCE) AND 8. SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 3, 7, 9, 10, 11 AND 13. AS TO PARAGRAPH 12, COURT STRIKES THE FIRST SENTENCE AND DENIES MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE BALANCE. COURT ADOPTS THESE RULINGS AND APPLIES THEM TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEARD THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN TOBONI'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (C.C.P. SECTION 664.6). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO A BINDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AFTER A LENGTHY MEDIATION BEFORE AN EXPERIENCED RETIRED JUDGE. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO FRUCIANO'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF FILED APRIL 30, 2008 ARE RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 2, 4, 5 (FIRST SENTENCE AND FOURTH SENTENCE), AND 8. SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 3, 7, 9, 10, 11 AND 13. AS TO PARAGRAPH 12, COURT STRIKES THE FIRST SENTENCE AND DENIES MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE BALANCE. COURT ADOPTS THESE RULINGS AND APPLIES THEM TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEARD THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE CITED IS NOT MATERIAL. THIS WAS A VOLUNTARY MEDIATION. CAL. RULE OF COURT 3.855 IS NOT APPLICABLE TO PRIVATE MEDIATIONS. THE CARBONE DECLARATION DEMONSTRATES THAT NO REASONABLE PERSON WOULD CONCLUDE THAT THE PRIOR LAWSUIT HAD ANY BEARING ON JUDGE CHIANTELLI BEING ABLE TO MEDIATE THE DISPUTE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For New Trial
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Kraus of Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter (956.8100) for defendant and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL is denied. The evidence cited is not material. This was a voluntary mediation. Cal. Rule of Court 3.855 is not applicable to private mediations. The Carbone Declaration demonstrates that no reasonable person would conclude that the prior lawsuit had any bearing on Judge Chiantelli being able to mediate the dispute. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Kraus of Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter (956.8100) for defendant and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Plaintiff's motion fails to comply with CCP section 663. Plaintiff is relying on new evidence not uncontroverted evidence that previously was before the Court. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Declaratory Relief Re Purpoted Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For Rescission
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FRUCIANO'S MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF RE PURPORTED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY FOR RESCISSION.
APPEARANCES: ANTHONY S. FRUCIANO, PRO PER (415.533.3459) APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. ANDREW M. ZACKS, ESQUIRE (ZACKS UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, 415.956.8100) AND MARK R. CARBONE, ESQUIRE (MACMORRIS & CARBONE, 415.563.2811) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THERE IS NO BASIS TO RESCIND THE AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO FRUCIANO'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF FILED APRIL 30, 2008 ARE RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 2, 4, 5 (FIRST SENTENCE AND FOURTH SENTENCE) AND 8. SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 3, 7, 9, 10, 11 AND 13. AS TO PARAGRAPH 12, COURT STRIKES THE FIRST SENTENCE AND DENIES MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE BALANCE. COURT ADOPTS THESE RULINGS AND APPLIES THEM TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEARD THIS DATE. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
